nodes.label: data_api.py — Read-Only REST Cockpit (/api)
nodes.rationale: Read-only data cockpit: sqlite opened with file:...?mode=ro URI so the dashboard can never corrupt betanalytix.db. The config editor PUT is explicitly 'the only writing endpoint'.

nodes.label: overview() — KPI Cards Endpoint (/api/overview)
nodes.rationale: Aggregates bankroll, ROI, win rate, max drawdown from decisions/bets/daily_stats; returns zeroed defaults instead of erroring when the DB file is missing.

nodes.label: clv() — CLV Series Endpoint (/api/clv)
nodes.rationale: Deliberately reuses src.betting.signals.compute_clv instead of reimplementing; docstring warns CLV 'needs weeks of snapshots to be meaningful'. NaN floats are sanitized to null for JSON.

nodes.label: odds() — Multi-Book Snapshot Endpoint (/api/odds)
nodes.rationale: Two-phase API: without ?match= returns match list of latest h2h snapshot; with ?match= returns per-bookmaker prices for that match.

nodes.label: put_config() — config.yaml Editor (PUT /api/config)
nodes.rationale: Safety pattern: yaml.safe_load validates content BEFORE touching the file, and shutil.copy2 writes a .yaml.bak backup before overwriting.

edges.source_location: clv(): runtime 'from src.betting.signals import compute_clv' inside endpoint — AST may miss
odds(): latest h2h snapshot from odds_history.csv

hyperedges.label: CLV Tracking Flow (signals log + odds snapshots → compute_clv → dashboard /api/clv)
